media_assets.product_name: Yellow Opal Diamond Classic Necklace Set

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: matching necklace and earring set, multi-stone design

media_assets.visual_description: The image features a model wearing a matching necklace and dangle earring set against a plain light gray background. The jewelry consists of numerous colorless or near-colorless round brilliant cut stones set in a silver-toned metal, accented with pear-shaped fancy yellow stones. The necklace forms a wide collar with multiple drops, and the earrings mirror this design with a cluster of white stones and a dangling yellow pear-shaped stone.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A model wears a dazzling necklace and earring set featuring colorless round brilliant diamonds and fancy yellow pear-shaped stones.

media_assets.product_name: Yellow Diamond Silver Plated Necklace Set

visual_features.shape_visible: emerald (for main yellow stones), oval (for smaller yellow stones), round brilliant (for colorless accent stones)
visual_features.color_appearance: fancy yellow (for main stones), colorless (for accent stones)
visual_features.size_impression: medium (main yellow stone on necklace, approx 1-2ct equivalent), small (<0.5ct for smaller yellow stones and accent stones)
visual_features.setting_or_mounting: prong set (for main yellow stones), pave/bezel set (for accent stones), forming a necklace and drop earrings
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The necklace has a central pendant and two smaller yellow stones integrated into the chain. The earrings are a matching pair.

media_assets.visual_description: A silver-toned necklace and matching drop earrings are displayed against a plain white background. The necklace features a central rectangular fancy yellow gemstone surrounded by smaller colorless stones, with two additional smaller oval yellow gemstones set along the chain. The earrings mirror the design of the central necklace pendant, each with a rectangular fancy yellow gemstone encircled by colorless stones.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Silver-toned necklace and matching drop earrings featuring fancy yellow emerald-cut gemstones surrounded by colorless accent stones.

media_assets.product_name: White Ruby & Green Jadau Chand Bali

visual_features.setting_or_mounting: drop earrings, likely prong or bezel set for stones, strung for pearls
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Intricate traditional design, multiple small colored stones, numerous pearl drops.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of ornate gold Chand Bali earrings against a plain white background. Each earring features a crescent-shaped hoop adorned with small red and green stones, intricate gold detailing, and a cluster of white pearl drops dangling from the bottom edge. A decorative floral-like stud with matching red and green stones connects to the hoop, with a small green stone cluster suspended within the hoop's opening.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of ornate gold Chand Bali earrings with red and green stones, intricate detailing, and white pearl drops on a white background.

visual_features.setting_or_mounting: stud earrings / pave set / prong set
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: two earrings, multiple stones, intricate design

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of symmetrical flower-shaped stud earrings against a plain white background. Each earring features a central round clear stone surrounded by six pink, pear-shaped stones, forming the inner petals. The outer petals are paved with numerous small, clear, round stones, all set in a bright gold-toned metal.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Pair of gold-toned flower stud earrings with pink pear-shaped stones and pave-set clear stones on a white background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Intricate design with multiple clear stones, red beads, and small white pearls. The clear stones appear to be kundan-style settings.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of ornate, gold-toned chandelier earrings against a plain white background. Each earring features a fan-like structure adorned with numerous clear, tear-drop shaped stones set in bezels, accented by small white pearls. Dangling from the bottom are multiple deep red, oval-shaped beads, adding a vibrant contrast to the gold and clear elements.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of ornate gold-toned chandelier earrings featuring clear tear-drop stones, small white pearls, and dangling red beads.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Two matching earrings are shown. The metal has a textured or beaded detail along the edges of the crescent shape.

media_assets.visual_description: Two matching gold-toned half-hoop earrings are displayed on a clean white background. Each earring features a crescent-shaped band adorned with multiple small, round, clear stones set along its outer curve, with a textured or beaded edge on the metalwork. The earrings have post-back closures and are positioned slightly angled, showcasing their design.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Pair of gold-toned half-hoop earrings with multiple round, clear stones set along the crescent shape on a white background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The bezel setting has a textured or beaded edge around the central stone.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of gold-toned stud earrings, each featuring a large, irregularly shaped, clear gemstone set in a textured bezel. The central stones exhibit good transparency and reflect light, appearing colorless or near-colorless. The earrings are presented against a plain white background, indicating a studio product shot.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of gold-toned stud earrings, each with an irregular, clear gemstone set in a textured gold bezel on a white background.

visual_features.setting_or_mounting: necklace / chandelier earrings / bezel set (stones) / dangling (pearls)
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: traditional Indian jewelry style, multiple small green stones, multiple dangling pearls, adjustable necklace cord with red and green tassels visible

media_assets.visual_description: A smiling woman with dark hair pulled back models a traditional gold-toned necklace and matching chandelier earrings. The necklace features a series of interconnected oval-shaped links, each adorned with small green stones, possibly emeralds, surrounded by intricate gold work and accented with dangling white pearls. The earrings mirror this design, featuring a larger central green stone element with multiple dangling pearls, all set in a gold-toned metal. The woman is wearing a light-colored, possibly cream or off-white, textured garment, against a soft, light background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Smiling woman wearing a traditional gold-toned necklace and matching chandelier earrings with green stones and white pearls.

visual_features.shape_visible: V-shape/collar necklace, chandelier earrings, small round pearls, various small geometric/floral shapes for gemstones
visual_features.color_appearance: multi-color (red, green, blue/teal gemstones), white pearls, yellow gold metal
visual_features.clarity_appearance: eye-clean (for visible size), pearls appear lustrous
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: traditional Indian design, intricate enamel work or stone inlay, pearl drops on both necklace and earrings

media_assets.visual_description: The image features a smiling model wearing a multi-color jadau necklace set, consisting of a collar-style necklace and matching chandelier earrings. The jewelry showcases intricate gold-toned metalwork adorned with small red, green, and blue/teal gemstones, along with numerous small white pearl drops. The model is wearing a light cream-colored saree with a gold border, and the background is a softly lit studio setting with a visible light source on the left.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Smiling model wearing a multi-color jadau necklace and matching chandelier earrings with red, green, blue gems and pearls.

reviews.author: Ipshita Mukherjee
reviews.text:
had an absolutely wonderful experience at OSR Jewellers. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel genuinely welcomed and valued. Their customer service is truly exceptional patient, knowledgeable, and never pushy. They took the time to understand exactly what I was looking for and showed me beautiful options.

What really stood out was their attention to detail and transparency while explaining the designs, quality, and pricing. The entire process felt smooth, comfortable, and trustworthy. It’s rare to find such a perfect balance of professionalism and warmth.

Highly recommend OSR Jewellers for anyone looking for stunning pieces and outstanding customer service. I will definitely be coming back!

reviews.author: Jasmine Gujral
reviews.text:
Amazing place with such beautiful variety of jewellery, Kartik n his team were so warm n welcoming, felt like home. Would recomend everyone to visit atleast once, because, you're bound to visit again!
Thank you to the entire team at OSR jewellers for being so friendly n understanding the need n providing me with what I had come looking for.

reviews.author: Rohin Parashar
reviews.text: The store offers a wide variety of jewellery that caters to all your requirements.Their product is of very high quality and carries 25 years if guarantee. In todays world that is pretty unique and that assurance is big enough for the customers, since in todays world no one really offerd that upfront service.The staff is equally helpful and courteous. Overall the store is a must visit.

reviews.author: Tatiana Jasmine
reviews.text: The people here were very friendly and helpful. We came to find pieces for a wedding. Our colors were unusual and our time frame was short and the staff was incredibly accommodating. They helped us get a matching set for my outfit, and they also did custom pieces for us for the outfit with unique coloring. I would definitely recommend and would return!

reviews.author: Anirudh Rayanapati
reviews.text:
Men friendly jewellery shopping. Way too patient , they've spent over 45 minutes and we ended up picking 2 pieces. A first time visit. We've also been given a gift .

Super happy ✌️✌️✌️

reviews.author: neena mittal
reviews.text: We came all the way from Punjab for the shopping , The collection is amazing , the staff is very sweet .kartik nayyar is excellent .jewellery is very well priced

reviews.author: Billu Sharma
reviews.text: Coming from the UK I have never seen any better jewellery brand ,they are super nice and exretemely well mannered .so happy to come here .bringing my whole family here next week

reviews.author: Jag Sekhon
reviews.text: Went here based on my mother's request, had a great service experience. They took their time to listen to what I wanted and helped me customize bridal jewelry. I went for wedding day jewelry and ended up also buying an incredible piece for my reception too. I appreciate the time to customize a piece.
